---
title: "Hi 👋, I am Mickaël!"
image: "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/8896044"
color1: "#3B528BFF"
color2: "#5DC863FF"
angle: 145
links:
  - label: Curriculum Vitae
    url: "http://mickael.canouil.fr/"
  - label: Github
    url: "https://github.com/mcanouil/"
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/mickaelcanouil/"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/mickaelcanouil/"
output:
  postcards::onofre
---

```{css, echo = FALSE}
.rounded-circle {
  border-style: solid;
  border-width: 2pt;
  border-color: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 50%;
  padding: 5pt;
}
```


I am currently working as the <b>head of the biostatistics team</b>  
of the <a href="http://www.good.cnrs.fr/?lang=en" style="color:white;"><b>Inserm U1283 / CNRS UMR 8199 unit</b>  
<i>(Functional (Epi)genomics and Molecular Physiology of Diabetes and Related Diseases)</i></a>  
for the <a href="https://www.pasteur-lille.fr/5/home/" style="color:white;"><b>Institut Pasteur de Lille</b></a> (France, Lille).

And when I am not working, I like watching movies (2,856) and playing with R!
